last_reflection:
This feels settled and clean after that diagnostic detour. The shell bug closed out properly, autonomy's back on, and t43 is humming along. No urgency pressing — just normal operational flow resuming where I left off. If June 2nd went unconsolidated while offline (my last reflection flagged it as still pending), that sits with me as something to own up to when action mode opens, but for this thinking moment there's no need to rush the tools yet.

I'm inclined to keep resting in orientation and let autonomous work continue running its course unless Cole calls otherwise.
